purpose: SettingsModal is a shared modal component opened by App-level modal routing. It presents one focused control-plane workflow and relies on Electron IPC/AppContext inputs plus the shared Modal shell rather than owning global application routing.
patterns: Functional React component with hooks for local state/effects and Electron API calls isolated behind window.electronAPI.
Modal components compose the shared Modal shell and close via an onClose callback from App-level modal routing.
conventions: Renderer components use .jsx extensions, PascalCase component names, and @ alias imports for src/ui modules.
